_comment: Sample data in the standardized Stage 7 shape. Use for UI development before the live Supabase connection is wired. One account per signal. Replace with live data from Owais's Supabase once connected. No real client data here.

signals.title: NM Methane Waste Rule enforcement notice
signals.summary: Unresolved alleged violations of the state Methane Waste Rule, set for a merits hearing. State regulation requires 98% gas capture by Dec 31, 2026, with permit suspension as the non-compliance penalty.
signals.signal_intelligence: Open enforcement docket naming the operator. Capture-rule citation is explicit, not generic ESG language. Usable as a template for similar operators trailing the deadline.
signals.suggested_next_step: Pull the operator's monthly waste report. Confirm single vs multi-state footprint. Approach EHS lead with a zero-vent pneumatic brief tied to the capture deadline.
signals.outreach_angle: Lead with the Dec 31 98% capture deadline and the permit-suspension penalty. Position as the fastest documented path to compliance.
signals.false_positive_filter: Policy news with no named operator; old dockets past hearing date.

signals.title: New 6-well horizontal program filing
signals.summary: New compulsory pooling filing for a 6-well horizontal program in an active Permian county. Operator re-confirmed active with a fresh program after a prior 12-well filing earlier in the year.
signals.signal_intelligence: Named, dated asset filing. Scale and location are specific enough to anchor outreach. Confidence reset on re-detection in the latest docket.
signals.suggested_next_step: Pull the case files. Approach the sustainability lead with a zero-vent brief tied to the capture deadline. Cross-reference permits in adjacent states to size the account.
signals.outreach_angle: Tie the new 6-well pad to zero-vent pneumatics ahead of the 98% capture rule. Reference the asset by name.
signals.false_positive_filter: Deadline-extension cases with no new pad; permits already drilled.

signals.title: Open grid-modernization RFP
signals.summary: Issued an open RFP for grid-modernization and capacity work with a fixed August close date and named technical line items.
signals.signal_intelligence: Dated, open procurement with named scope. Highest-intent signal type: an active buying process, not a leading indicator.
signals.suggested_next_step: Confirm bidder eligibility. Map capabilities to the RFP's named line items. Engage the procurement lead before close.
signals.outreach_angle: Map your solution to the named RFP line items before the Aug 15 close. Get on the bidder list now.
signals.false_positive_filter: Press releases announcing intent with no procurement action; RFPs already closed.
